Translation.Please enter your username and password: Please enter your username and password
Translation.Video Subject: Video Subject (Provide a keyword, :red[AI will automatically generate] video script)
Translation.Script Language: Language for Generating Video Script (AI will automatically output based on the language of your subject)
Translation.Custom Script Requirements Placeholder: Example: use a lighter tone, fit TikTok style, target young viewers, make the opening more suspenseful
Translation.Use Custom System Prompt Help: When enabled, this replaces the default script generation rules. Intended for advanced prompt users.
Translation.Generate Video Script and Keywords: Click to use AI to generate [Video Script] and [Video Keywords] based on **subject**
Translation.Video Script: Video Script (:blue[① Optional, AI generated  ② Proper punctuation helps with subtitle generation])
Translation.Generate Video Keywords: Click to use AI to generate [Video Keywords] based on **script**
Translation.Please Enter the Video Subject: Please Enter the Video Script First
Translation.Generating Video Script and Keywords: AI is generating video script and keywords...
Translation.Video Keywords: Video Keywords (:blue[① Optional, AI generated ② Use **English commas** for separation, English only])
Translation.Custom audio will be used directly. TTS: Custom audio will be used directly. TTS synthesis will be skipped for this task.
Translation.Custom Background Music File: Please enter the file path for custom background music:
Translation.Background Music Volume: Background Music Volume (0.2 represents 20%, background music should not be too loud)
Translation.Enable Subtitles: Enable Subtitles (If unchecked, the settings below will not take effect)
Translation.Custom: Custom position (70, indicating 70% down from the top)
Translation.Please enter a value between 0 and 100: Please enter a value between 0 and 100
Translation.Rounded Subtitle Background Help: Disabled by default. When enabled, subtitle backgrounds use a rounded translucent style that better fits the text width.
Translation.Video Script and Subject Cannot Both Be: Video Subject and Video Script cannot both be empty
Translation.You can download the generated video fro: You can download the generated video from the following links
Translation.Get Help: If you need help, or have any questions, you can join discord for help: https://harryai.cc
Translation.Please Select a Valid Video Source: Please Select a Valid Video Source
Translation.Voice Example: This is an example text for testing speech synthesis
Translation.No voices available for the selected TTS: No voices available for the selected TTS server. Please select another server.
Translation.Volume: Uses Speech Volume setting, defa: Volume: Uses Speech Volume setting, default 1.0 maps to gain 0
Translation.Uses Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 TTS preset voices: Uses Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 TTS preset voices
Translation.Speed and volume are currently handled b: Speed and volume are currently handled by the provider defaults
Translation.Hide Basic Settings:
Hide Basic Settings

Hidden, the basic settings panel will not be displayed on the page.

If you need to display it again, please set `hide_config = false` in `config.toml`
Translation.Click to show API Key management: Click to show API Key management
Translation.Manage Pexels and Pixabay API Keys: Manage Pexels and Pixabay API Keys
Translation.Please enter a valid API Key: Please enter a valid API Key
Translation.Select Pexels API Key to delete: Select Pexels API Key to delete
Translation.Select Pixabay API Key to delete: Select Pixabay API Key to delete
Translation.Manage Pexels, Pixabay and Coverr API Ke: Manage Pexels, Pixabay and Coverr API Keys
Translation.Select Coverr API Key to delete: Select Coverr API Key to delete
Translation.Video Encoder Help: Advanced option. libx264 is the safest default. When a hardware encoder is selected, the app falls back to libx264 if the current FFmpeg, GPU, or driver cannot use it.
Translation.Script Style Help: Pick 'TikTok Affiliate' to have the AI write a sales-driven script structured as hook → product benefits → call to action to buy via the cart/affiliate link. Ideal for TikTok affiliate marketing videos.
Translation.Caption: Caption
Translation.Caption Copy Hint: Select to copy the caption and hashtags, then paste into the description box when you publish.
Translation.Affiliate Product Ideas Hint: AI suggests promising products/niches for TikTok affiliate videos. These are trend-based suggestions, NOT real-time sales data.
Translation.Product Category Placeholder: e.g. Beauty, Home, Tech... (leave blank = all)
Translation.No Product Ideas: No ideas generated. Try again or change the category.
Translation.Hook Ideas Hint: AI writes several scroll-stopping opening lines (the first 3 seconds) for the subject above. Test different hooks to boost watch-through rate.
Translation.Hook Copy Hint: Select a hook to copy it, then paste it as the first line of your script.
Translation.Hook Use Hint: Click 'Use' to put a hook at the start of your script, or select the text to copy it.
Translation.Shot List Hint: AI breaks your script into a shot-by-shot shooting plan: what to film, the line to say, the on-screen text, and a b-roll keyword.
Translation.Shot List Use Hint: Film each shot top to bottom. Generate hooks and a script first for the best results.
Translation.No Shots: No shot list generated. Try again.
Translation.Comment Replies Hint: AI predicts the most common viewer comments (price, where to buy, does it work) and drafts ready-to-paste replies that point to your link.
Translation.Comment Replies Use Hint: Pin or paste these under your video. Edit them to match your own voice before posting.
Translation.No Comment Replies: No comment replies generated. Try again.
Translation.Trending Sounds Hint: AI suggests sound styles that fit your subject plus a keyword to search the in-app sound library. These are general patterns, not a live trending chart.
Translation.Trending Sounds Use Hint: Search these keywords in TikTok's sound library and pick a sound that is trending right now.
Translation.No Sounds: No sound ideas generated. Try again.
Translation.Text Stickers Hint: AI writes short on-screen captions (stickers) and a clear call-to-action covering the whole video, from the opening hook to the final tap-the-link prompt.
Translation.Text Stickers Use Hint: Add these as text overlays in the editor. Keep them short and remove any claim you can't back up.
Translation.No Stickers: No text stickers generated. Try again.
Translation.Cover Text Hint: AI writes bold cover headlines — the text on the cover frame shown in the For You feed and your profile grid. Each option uses a different angle so you can A/B test covers.
Translation.Cover Text Use Hint: Set one of these as the video cover text. Pick a bright, high-contrast frame and keep the headline in the top two thirds.
Translation.No Cover Text: No cover text generated. Try again.
Translation.Posting Schedule Hint: AI suggests best-practice time windows to post. These are general patterns based on typical shopper behaviour, NOT your real analytics — treat them as starting points to test.
Translation.Posting Schedule Use Hint: Test these windows first, then check your own TikTok analytics (Followers tab) and post when YOUR audience is most active.
Translation.No Posting Schedule: No posting schedule generated. Try again.
Translation.TikTok Length Hint: Aim for ~15-45s for best TikTok reach.
Translation.Export Copy Hint: Bundle the subject, hooks, script, shot list, keywords, caption, hashtags, comment replies, sound ideas, text stickers, cover text and posting schedule into one text file to archive or reuse.
Translation.Nothing to Export: Nothing to export yet. Generate a script, hooks or caption first.
